channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine Democrats propose a process to replace Platner; here is what will happen
Nigel Farage's by-election opponents are a remarkable clown show
WATCH: Democratic governor criticized for condemning 'tribal' politics while pushing redistricting
item.description: Gov. Wes Moore faces accusations of hypocrisy after criticizing tribalism in a speech while calling for a special redistricting session.

item.title: Republicans say Democrats are 'completely stained' by backing Platner through multiple scandals
item.description: Republicans link Graham Platner's controversies to Democrats in key midterm races that will decide control of Congress.
